# 🌟 Fluxion Modpack for Game Optimization 🌟

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b272fe86bbb3e4961fbaec641a782b6cd671c178_0.webp)

## 1. About the Modpack 📝  
   • Fluxion is a modpack created to optimize your game for version 1.20.1. It aims to improve performance and the smoothness of gameplay.

## 2. Advantages of Fluxion 🚀  
   • Enhanced Performance: The modpack includes mods that minimize system load.  
   • Smooth Gameplay: Graphics and settings optimization allows for lag-free and delay-free gaming.  
   • Ease of Installation: Fluxion is easy to install and configure, allowing you to start playing quickly.

## 3. Key Features 🔑  
   • Optimized Mods: Includes only the most effective mods to increase FPS.  
   • Compatibility: Full compatibility with version 1.20.1 and other popular mods.

## 4. Compatibility with DDM Server 🎮  
   • With Fluxion, you'll get a beautiful and simple TAB on the server!

## 5. Installation 📥  
   • Upon entering the game, activate the FluxionOptimization resource pack and set it to the highest priority.

## **To enable the Fluxion GUI, make sure to activate the corresponding resource pack as well.**
